summary: Bulk merge PR for #2491 and #2494-#2499 touching stage and lb library decomp work. Evidence shows grheal was moved from NonMatching to Matching, grheal/grzebesroute stage code gained matched functions and data/rodata/sdata coverage, and lbmemory/lbheap/lbsnap/lbcardnew/lbarq received code-match improvements. The PR body is only a checklist and there are no human review comments, so reusable lessons are inferred from diff evidence and the bot match report only.

key_files.role: Changed grheal object classification from NonMatching to Matching.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: configure.py Object(NonMatching, "melee/gr/grheal.c") -> Object(Matching, "melee/gr/grheal.c")

what_changed: PR body records this as a bulk merge of #2491 and #2494-#2499.
configure.py changed grheal from NonMatching to Matching.
grheal gained matched code for grHeal_8021F180 and grHeal_8021F70C plus data/rodata/sdata/sbss improvements reported by the bot.
grzebesroute gained a large implementation of grZebesRoute_8020B548, additional typed light/stage data aggregates, and data-section improvements reported by the bot.
lbarq replaced raw state numbers with LB_ARQ_STATE_* names, adjusted lbArq_80014ABC to return lbArqState, and used a scoped dont_inline pragma plus PAD_STACK in matching work.
lbmemory, lbheap, lbsnap, and lbcardnew had code-match improvements documented by changed-file metadata and the bot report, but their detailed hunks are mostly not present in the loaded excerpt.

smart_moves.text: Turning raw list state indices in lbarq into LB_ARQ_STATE_FREE/PENDING/DONE made the list manipulation more reviewable while preserving the code-match target.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: lbarq list[0/1/2] and state 0/1/2 replaced by LB_ARQ_STATE_*

smart_moves.text: Adding narrow local structs with STATIC_ASSERTs in grheal documented recovered data layout and guarded expected size.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grHeal_DataBlock and grHeal_StageData with STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(...))

smart_moves.text: The grzebesroute light-data aggregate gave names to related Vec3 positions used by the light update function.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grZebesRoute_LightData fields player_pos, spot_pos, spot_interest, upper_point_pos, lower_point_pos used in grZebesRoute_8020B42C and grZebesRoute_8020B548

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a data blob contains several adjacent logical records, a temporary local aggregate plus STATIC_ASSERT can make offset-sensitive accesses explicit during matching.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grHeal_DataBlock combines player_model_joint_ids, next_player_character_ids, callbacks, stage_filename, stage_data, report strings
diff_excerpt: STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(grHeal_DataBlock) == 0x190)

decomp_lessons.lesson: Replacing magic state indices with a recovered enum can improve readability without changing the underlying list-indexed state machine.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: LB_ARQ_STATE_FREE/PENDING/DONE used for global->list and node->state

decomp_lessons.lesson: Large stage matching PRs may require coordinated code and data/rodata/sdata ownership changes; report output should distinguish text matches from data-section completion.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists grheal function matches plus .data/.rodata/.sdata/.sbss entries
text_corpus: bot report lists grzebesroute .data/.rodata/.sdata/.sdata2 entries

naming_conventions.name: grHeal_UnkVec4, grHeal_DataBlock, grHeal_StageData, grHeal_UnkData
naming_conventions.convention: Stage-local recovered types use the stage prefix and either semantic layout names or Unk* when meaning remains unclear.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grheal typedef additions

naming_conventions.name: grZebesRoute_LightData
naming_conventions.convention: Recovered aggregate name describes the subsystem role when fields are supported by usage.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grZebesRoute_LightData fields consumed as light positions/interests in grZebesRoute_8020B548

naming_conventions.name: LB_ARQ_STATE_FREE/PENDING/DONE
naming_conventions.convention: Recovered enum constants replace raw numeric state values for state-machine list indices.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: lbarq raw 0/1/2 list indices and states replaced with LB_ARQ_STATE_*

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Scoped #pragma dont_inline was applied only around lbArq_80014ABC.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on before lbArq_80014ABC and #pragma pop after
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: Loaded evidence does not include reviewer discussion or adjacent-function validation; standard avoid-pragmas-register-asm treats this as an exception needing narrow proof.

evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: PAD_STACK(16) in lbArq_80014BD0
text_corpus: bot report shows lbArq_80014BD0 improved from 93.97% to 96.55%, not a full match
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: The PR evidence shows a score improvement but not a full match or rationale; standard matching-tactics-need-evidence suggests curator should treat this as tactic evidence, not a general style rule.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: grHeal_8021F70C preserved goto-labeled loop structure rather than a natural while loop.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: loop_start, loop_check, loop_compare, loop_done labels in grHeal_8021F70C
text_corpus: bot report shows grHeal_8021F70C reached 100%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: This conflicts with the natural-loops preference unless the goto shape was required for matching; the bot report supports the resulting match but no rationale is present.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Named sdata/sdata2 constants and report/assert strings were introduced for stage matches.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grHeal_804D49E0 "gobj", grZe_Route_804D4840 "gobj", grZe_Route_804D4848 "0"
diff_excerpt: grZe_Route_804DB918 and related f32/GXColor constants
text_corpus: bot report lists grheal/grzebesroute data-section improvements
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: Evidence supports data-section progress in this PR, but it should not be generalized into creating named storage without ownership evidence.

follow_up_queries: Inspect source PRs #2491 and #2494-#2499 separately for author rationale and review discussion hidden by this bulk merge.
Search for later changes to PAD_STACK(16) in lbArq_80014BD0 to see whether the tactic remained accepted.
Search for later cleanup of grHeal_8021F70C labels/gotos into a natural loop or comments explaining why labels were required.
Search for grHeal_DataBlock and grZe_Route_803E5E0C later refactors to confirm whether temporary data aggregates became stable path facts.
Search for current configure.py status of melee/gr/grheal.c to verify the matching path fact before curating it.

notes: The PR is a bulk merge, so it aggregates several source PRs and provides little direct author rationale.
No human review comments are available in the loaded slice.
The raw diff is truncated; lbmemory, lbheap, lbsnap, lbcardnew, and header details are mostly represented by changed-file metadata and bot report only.
Bot report provides match/improvement evidence but not build command, objdiff detail, or rationale for tactics such as PAD_STACK, pragmas, gotos, or data symbol creation.
Merged state is known from metadata, but this intake does not independently validate current source state.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use recovered enum constants for state-machine list indices when the state meaning is clear
accepted_candidate_records.text: In lbarq, raw list and state numbers 0/1/2 were replaced with LB_ARQ_STATE_FREE/PENDING/DONE across list manipulation and wait loops, improving reviewability while preserving the state-machine structure.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: lbarq raw state/list indices replaced with LB_ARQ_STATE_*

accepted_candidate_records.title: Temporary aggregate structs can document recovered adjacent data layout
accepted_candidate_records.text: grheal introduced local aggregate structs with STATIC_ASSERTs to model adjacent tables, callbacks, StageData, and report strings, making offset-sensitive accesses explicit while matching data/code.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grHeal_DataBlock and grHeal_StageData declarations with STATIC_ASSERTs

source_update_candidates.title: grheal configured as Matching in PR #2500
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2500 changed configure.py so Object(NonMatching, "melee/gr/grheal.c") became Object(Matching, "melee/gr/grheal.c"). Curator should verify current source before recording this as a path fact.

source_update_candidates.title: Record caution for PAD_STACK and scoped pragmas in partial-score improvements
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2500 used PAD_STACK(16) in lbArq_80014BD0 and a scoped dont_inline pragma around lbArq_80014ABC; the bot report shows lbArq_80014BD0 improved but did not reach 100%. Curator may consider whether standards should emphasize recording why such tactics remain when the target is not fully matched.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: PAD_STACK(16) in lbArq_80014BD0
diff_excerpt: scoped #pragma dont_inline around lbArq_80014ABC
text_corpus: lbArq_80014BD0 93.97% -> 96.55%
source_update_candidates.reason: The loaded standards already cover tactic evidence; this PR supplies an example candidate, not a new accepted rule.

source_update_candidates.title: Clarify data-symbol creation in code-match PRs with explicit bot data-section evidence
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2500 introduced named data/report/string/float/color symbols while the bot report recorded data/rodata/sdata/sdata2 improvements for grheal and grzebesroute. Curator may use it as an example for standards about documenting data ownership and separating text from data progress.

diff_excerpt: grZe_Route_804DB918..804DB944 constants

source_update_candidates.reason: Existing standards already warn against unsupported data churn; this PR is useful as an example only after source PR rationale is inspected.

rejection_notes: Do not infer reviewer approval of tactics; there are no loaded human reviews or review comments.
Do not generalize grHeal_8021F70C's goto loop as preferred style; it is only evidence of one matched implementation in this PR.
Do not promote named sdata/sdata2 constants or string-symbol replacements as a default practice; the PR only shows they were used with reported data-section progress.
Do not make detailed claims about lbmemory, lbheap, lbsnap, or lbcardnew implementation tactics from this slice because their hunks are not loaded beyond metadata and bot match rows.
